title: Vibrose's Modpack
description: We got mods for friends, for use with Vibrose's server.
body:
This Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric modpack includes

- BetterEnd and BetterNether
- Bewitchment
- Cobblemon
- Clutter
- Create
- JourneyMap
- JEI (Just Enough Items)
- Just Outdoor Stuffs
- Mermod
- Mythic Upgrades
- Paladins & Priests/Wizards (RPG Series)
- Plasmo Voice
- Terralith
- Traveler's Backpack

This modpack is to be used with Vibrose's server.
